name: Belonging
description: Songs about finding your people, your place, or your moment — and recognizing it when you do.

name: Courage
description: Songs about doing the difficult thing anyway. About choosing, even when the outcome is uncertain.

name: Home
description: Songs about belonging to a place, a person, or a feeling — and the quiet pull of returning to it.

name: Love
description: Songs about love in all its forms — romantic, familial, the kind that holds across time and distance.

name: Nostalgia
description: Songs that carry the past gently. Not with grief, but with the warmth of remembering.

name: Peace
description: Songs that slow things down. That give you permission to stop.

name: Wonder
description: Songs that open something up. That make the world feel bigger and stranger and worth exploring.
